chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 700 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 8569/2025. 2. For orders on MA 8570/2025. 13.10.2025. Mr. Jawad Ahmed, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant states that vide Order dated 03.07.2022 the applicants/accused Javed Iqbal Hashmi and others were granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that vide Order dated 07.10.2024 the interim bail granted to the applicants/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and subsequently vide judgment dated 08.04.2025, the applicants/accused were acquitted of the charge by the learned trial Court, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D. P.G, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and after going through the record, tendered no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
